points: Procedural Architecture: Architected core logic for an enterprise-level pool design tool, implementing procedural mesh generation.
Data Strategy: Designed modular architecture using Scriptable Objects and JSON persistence for save/load cycles.
Optimization: Integrated Addressables for memory management and utilized Blendshapes for high-performance mesh deformation.
Integration: Collaborated with backend to integrate REST APIs and technical artists for visual pipelines.
UI/UX Implementation: Built interactive 3D UI components ensuring high-fidelity user interaction.
Technical Maintenance: Debugged and refactored core C# scripts transitioning from prototype to production.
Agile Workflow: Mastered Git Version Control in a professional engineering team environment.
